//: Marks the served catalog as an ESM package so bare Node treats compiled `tools/<svc>/wrapper.js` files as ES modules (SF-1). The catalog ships no code of its own; `private` keeps it out of any publish. The symlinked `node_modules/zod` here lets catalog wrappers resolve the same zod the gateway uses (avoids the dual-zod hazard that silently empties generated JSON Schemas).
name: @praetorian/capability-gateway-catalog
